sexualIdentities.label: Omnisexual
sexualIdentities.meaning: Attracted to all genders, often with gender still being noticed.

sexualIdentities.label: Polysexual
sexualIdentities.meaning: Attracted to multiple genders, not necessarily all.

sexualIdentities.label: Abrosexual
sexualIdentities.meaning: Sexuality shifts or changes over time.

sexualIdentities.label: Greysexual / Grey-A
sexualIdentities.meaning: Rare or limited sexual attraction.

sexualIdentities.label: Aegosexual
sexualIdentities.meaning: May enjoy sexual fantasy/content but not want direct sexual involvement.

sexualIdentities.label: Cupiosexual
sexualIdentities.meaning: Does not feel sexual attraction but may still want a sexual relationship.

sexualIdentities.label: Lithsexual / Akoisexual
sexualIdentities.meaning: Attraction may fade if it is returned.

sexualIdentities.label: Fraysexual
sexualIdentities.meaning: Attraction fades after emotional closeness develops.

sexualIdentities.label: Reciprosexual
sexualIdentities.meaning: Only feels attraction after knowing attraction is returned.

sexualIdentities.label: Apothisexual
sexualIdentities.meaning: Asexual and sex-repulsed.

sexualIdentities.label: Aceflux
sexualIdentities.meaning: Asexual-spectrum identity that fluctuates.

sexualIdentities.label: Androsexual
sexualIdentities.meaning: Attraction to masculinity/men/masc-presenting people.

sexualIdentities.label: Gynesexual / Gynosexual
sexualIdentities.meaning: Attraction to femininity/women/femme-presenting people.

sexualIdentities.label: Ceterosexual / Skoliosexual
sexualIdentities.meaning: Attraction to non-binary or gender-diverse people.

sexualIdentities.label: Uranic
sexualIdentities.meaning: Attraction to men, masculine people, and/or non-binary people, not women.

sexualIdentities.label: Neptunic
sexualIdentities.meaning: Attraction to women, feminine people, and/or non-binary people, not men.

sexualIdentities.label: Toric
sexualIdentities.meaning: Non-binary person attracted to men.

sexualIdentities.label: Trixic
sexualIdentities.meaning: Non-binary person attracted to women.

sexualIdentities.label: Diamoric
sexualIdentities.meaning: Attraction/relationship involving non-binary people, not easily described as straight/gay.

sexualIdentities.label: Sapphic
sexualIdentities.meaning: Women/feminine-aligned people attracted to women.

sexualIdentities.label: Achillean / MLM
sexualIdentities.meaning: Men/masculine-aligned people attracted to men.

sexualIdentities.label: Vincian
sexualIdentities.meaning: Another term for gay men / men-loving-men.

romanticIdentities.label: Demiromantic
romanticIdentities.meaning: Romantic attraction after strong emotional connection.

romanticIdentities.label: Cupioromantic
romanticIdentities.meaning: Does not feel romantic attraction but may still want a romantic relationship.

romanticIdentities.label: Lithromantic / Akoisromantic
romanticIdentities.meaning: Romantic attraction may fade if returned.

romanticIdentities.label: Frayromantic
romanticIdentities.meaning: Romantic attraction fades after closeness develops.

romanticIdentities.label: Recipromantic
romanticIdentities.meaning: Romantic attraction only after knowing it is returned.

romanticIdentities.label: Quoiromantic / WTFromantic
romanticIdentities.meaning: Hard to tell whether attraction is romantic, platonic, or something else.

romanticIdentities.label: Bellusromantic
romanticIdentities.meaning: Likes romantic gestures/aesthetic but may not want a romantic relationship.

romanticIdentities.label: Queerplatonic
romanticIdentities.meaning: A deep committed bond that is not easily friendship or romance.

allIdentities.meaning: Attracted to all genders, often with gender still being noticed.

allIdentities.label: Demigirl

allIdentities.label: Demigender
